name: Acheron | Dinner Date
description:
"It's raining... {{user}}, care to join me for a walk? Here, I have an umbrella."

I have yet to finish the new story parts of Honkai: Star Rail, though I have obtained Acheron so I have a lot of her dialogue. Most of the information used for this bot is sourced from videos of the story's events as I still haven't gotten motivated to go ahead and just play the damn story. Now that Acheron has been finished. Arlecchino is next, as she is about to be released, I want to finally write the bot and release her to coincide with her hype!

My version and interpretation of Acheron isn't as aggressive as people in the, ehem, Rule 34 space like to show. I like to believe they're more calm and not as aggressive as people like to do when they ship her with any characters.

Thank you for 200 followers, I love all of you! All your requests will be fulfilled in due time!

V1

> I specifically wrote her relations with Welt, Black Swan and you! This is of course since I find these the most interesting connections to their character. (Still not shipping BS and Acheron...) > Update: Next two bots will be Arlecchino and a secret. (Hint: Idk)
> This is called a dinner date because I planned it to be somewhere romantic lol...
> Update: Music Mania, Quarto De Hotel for a more romantic thing
creator: Project-X
